name: An Overview of Internet Application Development (CA Sales Training June 1996)
description: 'An Overview of Internet Application Development' — Peter S. Kastner presentation to Computer Associates Sales Training, June 1996. Introduces the Internet/intranet stack (thin-client browser, TCP/IP, HTTP, CGI, firewall, RDBMS) and contrasts Internet applications with traditional client-server. Early canonical analyst framing of the Web as an application-delivery platform delivered to a CA sales audience in the Netscape-dominant pre-IE3 era.
